wikipedia.title: Baltimore County, Maryland
wikipedia.summary: Baltimore County is the third-most populous county in the U.S. state of Maryland. The county is part of the Central Maryland region of the state. Baltimore County partly surrounds but does not include the independent city of Baltimore. It is part of the Northeast megalopolis, which stretches from No

wikipedia.title: Maryland
wikipedia.summary: Maryland is a state in the Mid-Atlantic and Southern regions of the United States.
